# NexusCraft

> AI and environmental innovation learning platform. Master practical AI skills through real-world environmental projects, hands-on tasks, quizzes, and a global community of learners.

NexusCraft combines structured learning tracks (AI Innovation and Environmental Innovation), interactive video lessons, AI-generated flashcards, quizzes, real-world tasks with photo + GPS verification, a learner network, leaderboards, and a referral program. Learners earn Learning Credits and badges as they progress.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform, learning tracks, and community.
- [Learning Tracks](/tracks): Browse AI Innovation and Environmental Innovation tracks with lessons, videos, and projects.
- [Prompt Mastery](/prompt-mastery): Multi-level journey to master AI prompting skills.
- [Beginner Prompt Journey](/prompt-mastery/beginner): Introductory prompting lessons and exercises.
- [Intermediate Prompt Journey](/prompt-mastery/intermediate): Intermediate prompting techniques.
- [Advanced Prompt Journey](/prompt-mastery/advanced): Advanced prompting patterns and applications.
- [Tasks](/tasks): Real-world environmental tasks learners can complete to earn credits.
- [Sign Up](/signup): Create an NexusCraft account.
- [Log In](/login): Sign in to NexusCraft.

## Optional

- [Forgot Password](/forgot-password): Reset account password.
